description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a simple, boxy structure. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light color, with large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows on both floors. The front facade features a central double-door entryway, flanked by evenly spaced windows, and a straight concrete walkway leading up to the entrance across a neatly manicured lawn. The side and rear facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and no visible decorative elements. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms separated by partition walls. The overall design is clean, functional, and emphasizes geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and a central double-door entryway, set on a green lawn with a concrete walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and the concrete walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left side view with minimal windows and a plain wall, showing the side of the house and part of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a set of windows and a back door, with a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wall, minimal windows, and a continuation of the concrete walkway and lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entryway with no steps or porch, flanked by windows and accessed by a straight concrete walkway.
